overview: A full-stack cricket stats platform where fans browse player performance, leaderboards, and profiles — while admins manage players and match data from a secure dashboard.
features: Home page with gold/silver/bronze top 3 players by runs and wickets
Players directory with search and card layout
Player profile with aggregated stats, last 5 performances, and runs chart
Leaderboard with tabs for top runs, wickets, and best average
Secure admin panel with login, player CRUD, and performance entry
All stats calculated dynamically — no stored totals
